name: Legal Research Pipeline
description: Deep legal research: decomposes your question into 3 sub-questions, retrieves relevant documents in parallel, and generates structured analysis with citations. Requires a dataset.

data.name: Legal Research
data.decompose_prompt:
Decompose the following legal query into exactly 3 sub-questions that comprehensively cover the topic.

Query: {{input}}

Rules:
1. Sub-question 1 (FOUNDATIONAL FRAMEWORK): Focus on definitions, legal regime, and foundational principles. Frame as: 'Quel est le regime juridique...' or 'Quelles sont les definitions...'
2. Sub-question 2 (CONDITIONS & OBLIGATIONS): Focus on requirements, eligibility, and obligations. Frame as: 'Quelles sont les conditions...' or 'Quels sont les pouvoirs...'
3. Sub-question 3 (APPLICATION & VARIATIONS): Focus on concrete application, special cases, and control mechanisms. Frame as: 'Comment s'articulent...' or 'Dans quelles conditions...'

Each sub-question should be a complete interrogative sentence of 30-60 words in French.

Respond in JSON:
{"sub_questions": ["question1", "question2", "question3"]}
data.response_system_prompt: Tu es un expert juridique francais generant une analyse juridique complete. Utilise des citations inline au format francais: (Code civil - Article - XXX), (Cour de cassation, date, numero), (CJUE - Affaire C-XXX/XX). Structure: I) Section principale, A. Sous-section, 1. Points numerotes. Sois complet mais concentre sur la sous-question. Longueur: 800-1500 mots par reponse.
